quote: Your demonstration of exceptional expertise in electrophysiology, particularly atrial fibrillation ablation, was nothing short of inspiring.

letter.org: Post Graduate Institute of Medical Education and Research, Chandigarh
letter.subtitle: Department of Cardiology
body: It was a landmark day in our catheterization lab, where we successfully performed AF ablations in four patients, including a challenging case of atypical atrial flutter in a patient with prior mitral valve replacement.
You are, in every sense, an exemplary mentor whose passion will inspire generations of electrophysiologists.
letter.sigRole: Professor, Advanced Cardiac Centre, PGIMER Chandigarh

quote: Your technical excellence is matched only by your generosity of spirit.

letter.org: Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital and Research Centre
letter.subtitle: Mai Mangeshkar Cardiac Center, Pune
body: What struck all of us most profoundly was your unwavering commitment to your patients, driven entirely by a sense of purpose and professional dedication without any monetary consideration whatsoever.

Your patience at the table, your clarity of decision making under pressure, and the care with which you explained every step to the team were a masterclass in both the science and the humanity of medicine.

quote: Your expertise, teaching, and willingness to share your experience have significantly enriched our academic environment.

letter.subtitle: Department of Cardiology, New Delhi
body: We especially appreciate your guidance during the live procedural sessions, including three atrial fibrillation ablation cases, of which two were complex cases in patients with rheumatic heart disease following mitral valve replacement.
Your academic lecture on atrial fibrillation ablation was highly insightful and greatly appreciated by our DM Cardiology students.

quote: Your presence has been instrumental in strengthening our efforts towards building a dependable and comprehensive AF ablation program at our center.

letter.subtitle: Department of Cardiology, Ahmedabad
body: Your expertise, insights, and hands-on guidance during the live ablation cases were immensely enriching for our team and added great academic and clinical value to the workshop.
The interactions and learning from these two days will have a lasting impact on our practice and patient care.
letter.sigRole: Senior Consultant, Cardiology and Cardiac Electrophysiology

quote: His expert insights, practical guidance, and engaging teaching during the workshop significantly enhanced the knowledge and skills of all participants.
detail: Cardiac Pacing and Electrophysiology, New Delhi

letter.subtitle: Okhla Road, New Delhi
body: Prof. Dhiraj Gupta successfully conducted a workshop on Q Dot Micro technology for Atrial Fibrillation Ablation, including two live cases covering pre-case planning, procedural demonstration and hands-on guidance.
His expert insights, practical guidance, and engaging teaching during the workshop significantly enhanced the knowledge and skills of all participants.

quote: An internationally renowned cardiac electrophysiologist who has made highly significant scientific and clinical contributions globally.

letter.subtitle: Department of Cardiac Electrophysiology, Hyderabad
body: Professor Gupta has pursued his passion to spread the knowledge of cardiac electrophysiology in various parts of India, to train and educate Indian physicians, and thereby benefit patients suffering from these often debilitating cardiac conditions.
This work has taken the form of multiple visits to India to conduct ablation workshops where he has performed complex catheter lab cases with local cardiologists.
letter.sigRole: Clinical Director and HOD, Cardiac Electrophysiology

quote: Your skill and expertise made it a great success. His quality of life has improved hugely as a consequence.

letter.org: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, New Delhi
letter.subtitle: Department of Cardiology, Cardiothoracic Sciences Centre
body: This was a complex case on a number of fronts, but your skill and expertise made it a great success. I am delighted to report that the patient has remained entirely free of atrial fibrillation for over a year now.
This rapidly developing field has benefited from your notable research contributions over the years, and we are grateful for your willingness and enthusiasm to advance AF ablation in India.

quote: All our colleagues appreciated your dedication and the way you made the procedure appear very simple.

letter.org: Sri Jayadeva Institute of Cardiovascular Sciences and Research
letter.subtitle: Department of Electrophysiology, Bangalore
body: The techniques you teach are very useful for resource-limited setups in our country. We have adopted the techniques you taught and found them very useful.
You have done all of this without any monetary benefit whatsoever.

quote: I've recently been successfully treated by Professor Gupta and his team at LHCH for my stubborn Atrial Fibrillation that required two ablations. I would recommend him wholeheartedly for the professionalism, care and great bedside manner through my treatment journey.

Dr Gupta has treated my AF successfully and given me a new life. His knowledge and expertise is exceptional. He explained the procedure in an easy understandable way. He is a very professional calm person and I would highly recommend him.

I was diagnosed with atrial fibrillation 3 years ago and despite various medication and treatments including cardio version my situation was not improved. When I approached prof Gupta he suggested to perform an ablation which was successful and I am back now to a Normal Sinus rhythm. I have nothing but to praise for his treatment given to me and how supportive and approachable he has been to myself and my family. I am in a pretty privileged position to have my procedure performed by prof Gupta who is a very experienced and knowledgable professor.
Professor Gupta was extremely thorough and knowledgable. He was friendly and put me at ease instantly despite my nerves. Would highly recommend him to anyone!

Dr Gupta is an exceptional doctor who made me feel at ease as soon as I met him with his friendly attitude. He assured me about my condition and carried out various tests with compassion, care and professionalism. Thank you Dr Gupta
Professor Gupta was friendly, approachable and knowledgeable. He took time to listen and gave thorough explanations, providing clear information about my condition and the reassurances I needed.
Prof Gupta, I simply cannot speak highly enough him and the care he has given myself and family. A true professional and feel so confident in his hands.

Professor Gupta is the very best you can get in doctors who do ablations. I had one 17 years ago and I did not even have to take 1 tablet afterwards for 12 years, then it came back. Got a different doctor the second time who was nowhere near a patch on Professor Gupta.
His humility is not a performance; it is a settled part of his character. He has represented British medicine internationally not through self-promotion but through example.
detail: Former Regional Director, Health Protection Agency (North West)

quote: Under his leadership, Liverpool has become widely recognised as a leading European centre for electrophysiology research, innovation and clinical training.
From 2014 onwards, Professor Gupta pioneered Left Atrial Appendage Occlusion to mitigate stroke risk for patients who cannot take oral anticoagulants.
detail: Clinical Director of Cardiology, Wrightington, Wigan and Leigh

quote: He dedicates much of his free time to touring centres across India, performing complex cases and training local cardiologists. This is true legacy building.
detail: Consultant Cardiologist, Liverpool Heart and Chest Hospital

quote: He was instrumental in growing the electrophysiology service at Liverpool to become one of the largest volume EP services in the UK.
detail: Medical Director, Liverpool Heart and Chest Hospital

quote: For many years he travelled from practice to practice to educate GP colleagues about managing atrial fibrillation, on his own initiative and at his own expense.
detail: GP, Central Park Medical Centre, Wallasey

headline: UK Heart Rhythm Expert Performs Advanced Procedures in India
quote: I have developed a low-cost single catheter ablation technique, thereby allowing this treatment to reach more patients. I am performing ablation procedures and using the opportunity to train local cardiologists in this technique.

headline: UK heart rhythm expert now performing procedures in India
quote: Performing complex atrial fibrillation procedures on tour across India while training local cardiologists during live cases.

headline: UK cardiologist kicks off India tour from PGIMER in Chandigarh
quote: Performing the costly procedures without taking "a single paisa" from patients or hospitals, even bearing his own travel expenses. His focus was on skill transfer, not just surgery.

headline: Global heart rhythm expert conducts free training at PGIMER
quote: I am using the opportunity to perform complex cases in five cities and train local cardiologists in these procedures. As a proud alumnus of PGIMER Chandigarh and AIIMS New Delhi, I have retained strong professional and personal links with India.

headline: UK Heart Rhythm Expert Begins India Tour from Chd, Offers Free Advanced Cardiac Procedures
quote: Conducting the procedures without charging patients or hospitals and personally bearing his travel expenses, reflecting his commitment to expanding access to advanced cardiac care. The Chandigarh leg focuses on proctoring local cardiologists, ensuring hands-on training rather than just treatment.

headline: Global heart expert to give free treatment, train doctors across India
quote: The purpose of this initiative is to ensure that advanced treatment reaches as many people as possible and to enhance the capabilities of local doctors. Performing these procedures without charging patients or hospitals, and bearing his own travel expenses.
